title: ONE CIRCLE GROUPS - 211info
text: PHILOMATH YOUTH ACTIVITIES CLUB ONE CIRCLE GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Support groups focused on developing positive relationships. 421 S 19th Street Philomath, OR 97370 Eligibility: Girls Circle: Ages 9-18 who identify as female The Council: Ages 9-18 who identify as male Hours: Varies by support group Email (541) 929-4040 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 929-4040 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None at intake DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Philomath Services: Boys/Girls Clubs * Adolescents Boys/Girls Clubs * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH ATHLETICS PUBLIC SAFETY - PHILOMATH SAFETY TOWN PUBLIC SAFETY - SAFETY TOWN SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CLEMENS CLUBHOUSE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - FUN IN THE SUN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
